text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's vice-president and right hand,
Air Groove, worries for her wellbeing since she
insists on balancing her student council duties
with a grueling training schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other vice-president, Narita Brian, comes off
as blunt at first, but she clearly cares for the
student council's new general manager.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems delighted to have people
looking up to her. Over the course of the day, I
catch a glimpse of her relationships with the other
student council members.
